name: ParkWhiz Partner API
description: The ParkWhiz Partner API v4 provides comprehensive parking search, booking, and management capabilities. Features include parking availability search, location details, booking creation and management, account management, and review functionality. Supports OAuth 2.0 authentication with multiple grant flows.
